tools.name: enrich_wallet
tools.description: Get a Solana wallet profile: SOL balance, token holdings, DeFi positions, labels (whale, active_trader, defi_user), risk score, and risk level.

tools.name: enrich_token
tools.description: Analyze a Solana SPL token: price, market cap, liquidity, holder concentration (top 1/5/10%), slippage estimates at 4 position sizes ($100/$1K/$10K/$100K), risk flags, and Jupiter verification.

tools.name: parse_transaction
tools.description: Parse a Solana transaction: type, protocol, SOL/token transfers, accounts involved, and fee details.

tools.name: whale_watch
tools.description: Track top token holders: balances, % supply, buy/sell volumes, accumulation vs distribution signals.

tools.name: due_diligence
tools.description: Comprehensive token research: security audit, holder concentration, whale activity, risk score with level (LOW-CRITICAL), and SAFE/CAUTION/RISKY verdict.

tools.name: wallet_graph
tools.description: Map wallet connections: find counterparties, detect clusters of coordinated wallets, and identify suspicious patterns.

tools.name: copy_trade_signals
tools.description: Analyze a wallet's trading performance: win rate, PnL, consistency, hold time, and smart_money classification.

tools.name: batch_enrich
tools.description: Enrich multiple wallets or tokens in a single call (1-25). Returns parallel results.

tools.name: compare_tokens
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of 2-3 tokens: price, liquidity, volatility, holder concentration, risk. Rankings and summary picks.

tools.name: compare_wallets
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of 2-3 wallets: portfolio, activity, risk, labels. Rankings and summary picks.

tools.name: token_trend
tools.description: Token metrics over time: daily snapshots with direction indicators (improving/declining/stable) per metric.

tools.name: wallet_history
tools.description: Wallet portfolio over time: snapshots with position changes (added/removed holdings) and direction indicators.

tools.name: portfolio_history
tools.description: Full portfolio time-series for a wallet: daily snapshots of value, balance, holdings, and risk score over 7/14/30 days, plus summary stats (peak, trough, max drawdown, average, change vs period start). For charting and PnL tracking.

tools.name: new_tokens
tools.description: Discover recently launched Solana tokens. Filters by liquidity and risk score, ranked safest first.

tools.name: protocol_profile
tools.description: DeFi protocol analytics: TVL, yield pools, on-chain activity, health signals. Supports Raydium, Orca, marginfi, Drift, Jupiter, Kamino, Marinade, Jito, and more.

tools.name: query
tools.description: Ask a plain English question about any Solana wallet, token, or market. Single-intent routes to one enricher; compound intents chain 2-3 in parallel and return a unified briefing. Examples: "should I buy <mint>?" (DD + trend + whales), "wallet deep dive on <addr>" (profile + history + perps), "is <m

tools.name: perps_market_structure
tools.description: Per-market OI, utilization, borrow APR, skew, OI caps, and health flags across Jupiter Perps SOL/BTC/ETH. Reads on-chain Anchor accounts directly.

tools.name: perps_trader_profile
tools.description: Open positions across BOTH Jupiter Perps and Adrena for a wallet. Per-venue breakdown plus combined totals. Each position tagged with venue. Trader classification (scalper/swing/position), directional bias, multi-venue exposure flag, and risk flags (high leverage, approaching liquidation, concentrat

tools.name: hyperliquid_trader_profile
tools.description: Live Hyperliquid perp positions for an EVM (0x) address, read from HL's public on-chain state. Per-position side, leverage, notional, entry, unrealized PnL, distance-to-liquidation, and risk flags. Account value, directional bias, profile (directional/market-neutral/diversified), and realized+unreal

tools.name: hyperliquid_smart_money
tools.description: Where Hyperliquid smart money is positioned. Filters the HL leaderboard to consistent directional traders (excludes market-makers + dust), then aggregates their live positions into a per-coin consensus (long/short counts, net notional, bias, conviction) plus a top-trader drill-down. Optionally focus

tools.name: perps_basis_signal
tools.description: Computes perp mark vs spot price across venues and surfaces actually-earnable yield. Funding-rate venues (HL, dYdX) generate real yield; pool perps (Jupiter, Adrena) flagged as not viable because they charge borrow on both sides. Returns per-venue trade + filtered opportunities + best trade.

tools.name: perps_market_trend
tools.description: Per-symbol (SOL/BTC/ETH) deltas for mark price, total open interest, long/short skew, utilization, and borrow APR over 7/14/30 days. Direction indicators per metric and per market. Overall direction excludes mark price. Use for regime detection — bots that adjust behavior based on whether markets ar

tools.name: perps_venue_comparison
tools.description: Where to trade this market at this size. Builds on cross-venue funding with spot slippage, per-venue fee, OI cap headroom, and total entry cost. Returns rankings + recommendation with warnings.

tools.name: perps_cross_venue_funding
tools.description: Compare borrow/funding APR + OI across Solana on-chain venues (Jupiter Perps, Adrena) and cross-chain reference (Hyperliquid, dYdX v4). Returns best entry per side, basis vs Hyperliquid, and arbitrage opportunities. SOL/BTC/ETH/BONK supported (with venue-specific availability).

tools.name: trending_signals
tools.description: Ranked list of Solana tokens worth paying attention to right now. Composes DexScreener trending + risk scoring + whale-flow into a composite signal with reasoning.

tools.name: smart_money_flow
tools.description: Where high-performing Solana wallets are moving. Scores seed wallets by copy-trade metrics, surfaces tokens they're accumulating, and maps wallet clusters.

tools.name: smart_money_trenches
tools.description: Which proven-winner wallets are aping fresh (<6h) memecoin launches right now, and what are they buying? Vetted realized-PnL winner seed set (bot-filtered), recent buys overlaid against token launch times, ranked by distinct smart buyers + recency. Pre-ape attention signal.

tools.name: feed_latest
tools.description: Daily intelligence brief — pre-computed ranking of trending Solana tokens with composite-signal scoring. Cached 24h, lazy-populated on cache miss. Pass `since` (ISO 8601) to short-circuit on no-change polls.

tools.name: check_alerts
tools.description: Poll-based event detection covering spot + Jupiter Perps. Pass a watchlist (token mints + wallet addresses) and a since timestamp; receive alerts graded by severity. Spot alerts: price spike/drop, risk change, whale flow, concentration shift, portfolio value change, position add/remove. Jupiter Perp

tools.name: consensus_signal
tools.description: What tokens or wallets are being queried by other agents right now. Proprietary data derived from SolEnrich's own query stream. Pass `address` for that entity's rank/percentile/trend; omit it for top-N. Windows: 1h, 6h, 24h.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "query" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
